framework.name: Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) - Google
framework.description: Open-source protocol for AI agent-initiated payments using cryptographically signed verifiable credentials to establish authorization boundaries and accountability. Uses role-based architecture separating shopping agents, credential providers, merchant endpoints, and payment processors. Designed for compatibility with Agent-to-Agent (A2A) and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
framework.raw_quote: AP2 is an open-source protocol designed to create a secure and trusted foundation for the future of AI-driven payments. It's compatible with existing standards such as agent to agent or A2A and model context protocol MCP.
